headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 4, 2026**
article:
The Minnesota Twins edged out the Toronto Blue Jays 4-3 in a closely contested game, with Kazuma Okamoto leading the Blue Jays' offense. The Houston Astros secured a 3-1 victory over the Boston Red Sox, with Bryan Abreu earning the win. The Cincinnati Reds dropped a 1-0 decision to the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Gregory Soto earning the win.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, affecting their teams' lineups. Yusei Kikuchi has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left shoulder inflammation, effective retroactive to April 30, 2026. Ronny Mauricio is out with a left thumb fracture, while Germán Márquez is dealing with forearm nerve inflammation. Ronald Acuña Jr. has a left hamstring strain, and Will Wilson is out with a left thumb fracture.

The Detroit Tigers have bolstered their roster with the acquisition of infielder Zack Short from the Washington Nationals in exchange for cash. The Los Angeles Dodgers have also made a move, trading for second baseman Tyler Fitzgerald from the Toronto Blue Jays for cash.

top_news.title: **Twins Take Down Blue Jays in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins edged out the Toronto Blue Jays 4-3 in a closely contested game. Kazuma Okamoto led the Blue Jays' offense with a home run and two RBIs.

top_news.title: **Astros Take Down Red Sox 3-1**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros secured a 3-1 victory over the Boston Red Sox, with Bryan Abreu earning the win.

top_news.title: **Reds Fall Short in Pittsburgh**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds dropped a 1-0 decision to the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Gregory Soto earning the win. Chase Burns led the Pirates' pitching staff with 7.0 innings pitched, 7 strikeouts, and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Yankees Rout Orioles 11-3**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a convincing 11-3 victory. Jasson Domínguez led the Orioles' offense with 3 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Kikuchi Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Angels left-hander Yusei Kikuchi has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left shoulder inflammation, effective retroactive to April 30, 2026.

top_news.title: **Tigers Acquire Zack Short in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers have made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring infielder Zack Short from the Washington Nationals in exchange for cash.
